name: FabricAI.Prompt
signature: FabricAI.Prompt(input as text, optional context as any) as text
description: Returns the result of passing the specified `input` to an AI model. An optional `context` value can be provided in order to specify additional data that's relevant to the request.

examples.usage:
FabricAI.Prompt(
    "Categorize the review as positive, negative, or neutral, and extract a single key word in parentheses.",
    [Review = "This is a great product. It only broke four times before we had to return it!"]
)
